channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年6月11日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Building an HTML-first site doubled our users overnight #2 I'm Eric Ries, author of "The Lean Startup" and new book "Incorruptible" – AMA #3 PgDog is funded and coming to a database near you #4 Apache Burr: Build reliable AI agents and applications #5 GitHub Authentication issues related to API requests #6 Textbooks Should Be Free #7 Mercedes‑Benz starts large‑scale production of electric axial flux motor #8 Postgres by Example #9 macOS Container Machines #10 All 9,300 Japanese train station, animated by the year it opened (1872–2026)

item.title: 2026年6月11日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 πFS #2 Cybersecurity researchers aren't happy about the guardrails on Anthropic's Fable #3 A Written Language for the Cherokee So Efficient It Was Thought to Be Magic #4 Anthropic requires 30 day data retention for Fable and Mythos #5 How JPL keeps the 13-year-old Curiosity rover doing science #6 I'm Eric Ries, author of "The Lean Startup" and new book "Incorruptible" – AMA #7 PgDog is funded and coming to a database near you #8 L'Affaire Siloxane #9 GeoLibre 1.0 #10 Show HN: Extend UI – open-source UI kit for modern document apps
